title: Nimbus Post is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Nimbus Post is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Nimbus Post. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Warehouse Manager to strengthen our Srinagar-based team.

About Nimbus Post:
Nimbus Post is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nimbus Post!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
